title: RevitParameterDifference
description: RevitParameterDifference: Represents a difference in terms of RevitParameters found between a Previous and Following version of an object.

Name.description: The name of the Parameter that is different.

Description.description: A human-friendly description associated with this difference.

UnitType.description: Unit type of the Revit parameter.

FullName.description: Full Name of the object's property that owns the RevitParameter that was different.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
